fileName: Enhydra lutris sea otter face photo.jpg
alt: Sea otter face showing nose whiskers and dense fur
caption: Dense fur keeps cold ocean water away from a sea otter's skin.
acquisitionNotes: Core article image curated separately from the otter gallery set.
